body:
This fixes the error we were getting when writing `Field`s reduced over 3 dimensions to disk with `NetCDFOutputWriter` according to the upstream provided in a PR at NCDatasets: https://github.com/Alexander-Barth/NCDatasets.jl/issues/197.

This PR also adds a test to catch this in the future.

For now this is only working on the `master` branch of  `NCDatasets` so tests should fail for now, but once a new version of NCDatasets is released I'll update the packages.

Closes https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/2857
title: Fixes writing of 3d-reduced `Field`s to NetCDF
